title: Terms of Service
s1_body: By creating an account or using pTrack, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must stop using the app immediately.
s2_body: You must be at least 16 years old to use pTrack. By registering, you represent that you meet this requirement.
s3_li1: Submit only genuine waste reports with accurate GPS locations.
s3_li2: Upload only photos you took yourself or have rights to share.
s3_li3: Not submit false, misleading, or duplicate reports.
s3_li4: Not attempt to game the points system through automated or fraudulent activity.
s3_footer: Violations may result in point resets, account suspension, or permanent bans at our sole discretion.
s4_body_pre: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately at
s5_body1: You retain ownership of content (photos, descriptions) you upload. By submitting, you grant pTrack a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to store and display your content for the purpose of community impact reporting.
s5_body2: Do not upload content that is offensive, defamatory, or that violates the rights of others. We reserve the right to remove any content at our discretion.
s6_body1: Points have no monetary value and cannot be exchanged for cash. We reserve the right to adjust, revoke, or reset points at any time, including in cases of fraudulent activity or system errors.
s6_body2: Future reward redemption features (if introduced) will be governed by additional terms published at that time.
s7_body: pTrack is provided "as is." We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. We may update, suspend, or discontinue features at any time. Material changes to these Terms will be notified via in-app banner 14 days in advance.
s8_body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, pTrack and its contributors are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, including data loss or service interruptions.
s9_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Rwanda. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Kigali, Rwanda.
s10_body: For questions about these Terms, email
